response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack developer with strong testing/TDD discipline and breadth across languages, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis using C++. Primary expertise is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang on web and data-integration systems, not cloud compute platform internals in C++. The minimum C++ bar is not met.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring via workshops and dojos
Broad polyglot experience including low-latency DLang microservices handling millions of req/s at Dunnhumby
Demonstrated technical leadership through talks, courses, open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only short C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure experience in C++
No formal cloud/DevOps mentoring track record at the scale implied by the role

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra background
Strong engineering craftsmanship and mentoring history
